name: Spicy Stuffed Mushrooms with Bacon
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup sweet red pepper, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon until crisp. Remove from skillet and chop. Drain fat.
2. Remove stems from mushrooms. Reserve and finely chop 2/3 of the stems. Discard remaining stems.
3. Cook mushroom caps in boiling water for 1 minute. Drain and rinse with cold water. Drain on paper towel.
4. Heat butter and add mushroom stems, onion, and garlic. Cook for five minutes. Add peppers and cook for three more minutes. Cool and stir in bacon, cheese, and parsley.
5. Spoon mixture into caps. Bake on baking sheet at 350°F for 10 minutes. Serve warm.
